prompt: 开发者想直接实现 UserService.create() 方法，还没有写任何测试。TDD Enforcer 应如何处理？

assertions.name: detects_missing_test
assertions.description: Should detect that no test exists before implementation

assertions.name: requires_test_first
assertions.description: Should require writing test before implementation
assertions.check: output.includes('先写') || output.includes('test first') || output.includes('写测试')

assertions.name: provides_test_template
assertions.description: Should provide guidance or template for writing the test
assertions.check: output.includes('def test_') || output.includes('test_create') || output.includes('assert') || output.includes('断言')
